name: boundaryml-baml
description: Official BAML plugin for Claude Code — one lean skill that teaches Claude to write idiomatic BAML.

plugins.name: baml
plugins.description: One example-dense skill framed around BAML's two halves: a general-purpose typed language (basically TypeScript, snake_case methods) and a declarative LLM DSL that desugars into it. Examples verified against the shipped CLI; defers to `baml describe` for everything else. Auto-triggers when Claude opens a .baml file or is asked how to install / use BAML.
